cases.passage: The Indian government has announced a plan to increase exports of handicrafts to the European market. The plan involves training artisans in modern techniques and packaging to make their products more attractive to foreign buyers. Additionally, the government will provide financial assistance to small-scale artisans to help them participate in international trade fairs. However, some experts have raised concerns about the impact of mass production on the traditional craftsmanship of the artisans. They argue that the government should focus on promoting niche markets where Indian handicrafts can be sold at premium prices, rather than trying to compete with cheap imports from other countries.

questions.q: Why is the Indian government planning to increase exports of handicrafts to the European market?
opts: (A) To increase employment opportunities for artisans
(B) To earn foreign exchange
(C) To promote traditional craftsmanship
(D) To support small-scale industries
questions.explanation: The government wants to earn foreign exchange.

questions.q: What is the government planning to do to make Indian handicrafts more attractive to foreign buyers?
opts: (A) Provide financial assistance to small-scale artisans
(B) Train artisans in modern techniques and packaging
(C) Increase the price of handicrafts
(D) Reduce the quality of handicrafts
questions.explanation: The government will train artisans in modern techniques and packaging to make their products more attractive.

questions.q: What are the concerns raised by some experts about the government's plan to increase exports of handicrafts?
opts: (A) That the government is not providing enough financial assistance to artisans
(B) That mass production will harm traditional craftsmanship
(C) That the government is not focusing on niche markets
(D) That the government is not promoting small-scale industries
questions.explanation: Experts are concerned that mass production will harm traditional craftsmanship.

questions.q: What is the alternative approach suggested by the experts to promote Indian handicrafts?
opts: (A) To promote traditional craftsmanship
(B) To focus on niche markets where products can be sold at premium prices
(C) To increase the price of handicrafts
(D) To reduce the quality of handicrafts
questions.explanation: Experts suggest promoting niche markets where products can be sold at premium prices.

questions.q: Why is the government planning to provide financial assistance to small-scale artisans?
opts: (A) To increase employment opportunities
(B) To help them participate in international trade fairs
(C) To promote traditional craftsmanship
(D) To earn foreign exchange
questions.explanation: The government wants to help them participate in international trade fairs.

cases.passage: The Japanese electronics company, Sony, has announced plans to set up a new manufacturing facility in India to produce smartphones. The facility will create thousands of jobs for local workers and will also help Sony to reduce its dependence on imports. However, some analysts have raised concerns about the impact of this move on the Indian electronics industry. They argue that Sony's entry into the Indian market will lead to increased competition and may even force some local manufacturers to shut down. On the other hand, some experts believe that Sony's entry will also create opportunities for Indian companies to partner with the global giant and upgrade their technology.

questions.q: Why is Sony setting up a new manufacturing facility in India?
opts: (A) To reduce its dependence on imports
(B) To increase its market share in India
(C) To promote Indian culture
(D) To reduce its production costs
questions.explanation: Sony wants to reduce its dependence on imports.

questions.q: What is a potential outcome of Sony's entry into the Indian market?
opts: (A) Increased competition and the closure of local manufacturers
(B) Reduced competition and increased market share for local manufacturers
(C) No impact on the Indian electronics industry
(D) Improved technology for local manufacturers
questions.explanation: Increased competition and the closure of local manufacturers is a potential outcome.

questions.q: What is the view of some experts on Sony's entry into the Indian market?
opts: (A) That it will lead to the closure of local manufacturers
(B) That it will create opportunities for Indian companies to partner with Sony and upgrade their technology
(C) That it will have no impact on the Indian electronics industry
(D) That it will reduce competition in the market
questions.explanation: Experts believe that Sony's entry will create opportunities for Indian companies to partner with Sony and upgrade their technology.

questions.q: Why are some analysts concerned about Sony's entry into the Indian market?
opts: (A) Because it will create jobs for local workers
(B) Because it will reduce competition in the market
(C) Because it will increase competition and may force local manufacturers to shut down
(D) Because it will promote Indian culture
questions.explanation: Analysts are concerned that Sony's entry will increase competition and may force local manufacturers to shut down.

questions.q: What is a potential benefit of Sony's entry into the Indian market?
opts: (A) Reduced production costs for Sony
(B) Increased market share for Sony
(C) Improved technology for Indian companies
(D) Increased dependence on imports
questions.explanation: Improved technology for Indian companies is a potential benefit.
